fix.item: Added an update server URL to the plugin manifest.
Added a changelog URL to the plugin manifest.
Added a GPL-compatible header to the main plugin class.
Improved Turkish admin translations for the API key field and About tab.
Renamed the basic fieldset label to Plugin Settings.

note.item: Edit the GitHub URLs if you use a different repository name or release path.
The checksum values in update.xml match the ZIP generated for version 0.1.6.

addition.item: Added a new About fieldset to the plugin configuration.
Added usage notes and support information inside the plugin settings.
